---
title: "2026 ERA Regression Prediction"
author: "Adam Holtsmaster"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(tidymodels)
library(xgboost)
library(gt)

conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::lag)
tidymodels::tidymodels_prefer()
set.seed(42)

if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs")

```

```{r}

hist_path <- "C:/Users/Adam/Desktop/INDY/2026 ERA Projection/2018-2024 Pitching Data.csv"
p2025_path <- "C:/Users/Adam/Desktop/INDY/2026 ERA Projection/2025 Pitching Data.csv"

```

```{r}

hist <- readr::read_csv(hist_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

p2025 <- readr::read_csv(p2025_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

prep <- function(df){
  df %>%
    rename(pitcher_name = last_name_first_name) %>%
    mutate(
      pitcher_name = str_squish(pitcher_name),
      player_id = as.character(player_id),
      year = as.integer(year)
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(
      c(p_win, p_loss, p_era, xwoba, sweet_spot_percent, barrel_batted_rate,
        hard_hit_percent, avg_best_speed, avg_hyper_speed, whiff_percent, swing_percent),
      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))
    )) %>%
    
    mutate(decisions = coalesce(p_win, 0) + coalesce(p_loss, 0))
}

hist <- prep(hist)
p2025 <- prep(p2025)

all_df <- bind_rows(hist, p2025)

```

```{r}

pairs <- hist %>% 
  filter(!is.na(pitcher_name), pitcher_name !="") %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) %>%
  arrange(pitcher_name, year) %>%
  group_by(pitcher_name) %>%
  mutate(
    era_next = lead(p_era),
    year_next = lead(year)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(era_next),year_next == year + 1)

pairs <- pairs %>%         
  filter(!is.na(p_era), !is.na(xwoba)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(whiff_percent) | !is.na(hard_hit_percent) | !is.na(barrel_batted_rate))

pairs <- pairs %>% 
  mutate(
    p_era = pmin(pmax(p_era, 0.50), 12.00),
    era_next = pmin(pmax(era_next, 0.50), 12.00)
  )
  
hist <- hist %>% 
  filter(!is.na(player_id), player_id != "") %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year))

```

```{r}

pairs <- pairs %>%
  group_by(player_id) %>%
  arrange(year) %>%
  mutate(
    #year-over-year deltas
    d_xwoba = xwoba - lag(xwoba),
    d_whiff = whiff_percent - lag(whiff_percent),
    d_hardhit = hard_hit_percent - lag(hard_hit_percent),
    d_barrel = barrel_batted_rate - lag(barrel_batted_rate),
    d_swing = swing_percent - lag(swing_percent),
    d_ear = p_era - lag(p_era),
    d_decisions = decisions - lag(decisions),
    #2 year rolling averages
    xwoba_2yr = (xwoba + lag(xwoba)) / 2,
    whiff_2yr = (whiff_percent + lag(whiff_percent)) / 2,
    hardhit_2yr = (hard_hit_percent + lag(hard_hit_percent)) / 2, 
    barrel_2yr = (barrel_batted_rate + lag(barrel_batted_rate)) / 2,
    decisions_2yr = (decisions + lag(decisions)) / 2,
    # gap signal
    era_wxoba_gap = p_era - xwoba,
    #velocity signals
    velo_gap = avg_best_speed - avg_hyper_speed
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

```

```{r}
max_pair_year <- max(pairs$year, na.rm = TRUE)
holdout_years <- c(max_pair_year - 1, max_pair_year)

train_set <- pairs %>% filter(!year %in% holdout_years)
test_set  <- pairs %>% filter(!year %in% holdout_years)

```

```{r}

predictors <- c(
  "p_era","xwoba","sweet_spot_percent","barrel_batted_rate","hard_hit_percent","avg_best_speed","avgZ_hyper_speed","velo_gap","whiff_percent","swing_percent","decisions","d_xwoba","d_whiff","d_hardhit","d_barrel","d_swing", "d_era", "xwoba_2yr","whiff_2yr","hardhit_2yr","barrel_2yr","era_xwoba_gap", "d_decisions", "decisions_2yr"
)

predictors <- intersect(predictors, names(train_set))

train_mod <- train_set %>% 
  select(pitcher_name, year, era_next, any_of(predictors))

test_mod <- test_set %>% 
  select(pitcher_name, year, era_next, any_of(predictors))

cat("pairs rows:", nrow(pairs), "\n")
cat("train_set rows:", nrow(train_set), "\n")
cat("test_set rows:", nrow(test_set), "\n")
cat("train_mod rows:", nrow(train_mod), "\n")

rec <- recipe(era_next ~ ., data = train_mod) %>%
  update_role(pitcher_name, year, new_role = "id") %>%
  step_impute_median(all_predictors()) %>%
  step_zv(all_predictors()) %>%
  step_normalize(all_predictors())

xgb_spec <- boost_tree(
  mode = "regression",
  trees = tune(),
  tree_depth = tune(),
  learn_rate = tune(),
  min_n = tune(),
  loss_reduction = tune(), 
  mtry = tune()
) %>% set_engine("xgboost")

wf <- workflow() %>% add_recipe(rec) %>% add_model(xgb_spec)

v <- min(5, nrow(train_mod))
if (v < 2) stop("train_mod has fewer than 2 rows. Your Year N -> Year N+1pairs are not being created.")
folds <- vfold_cv(train_mod, v = v)

xgb_spec <- boost_tree(
  mode = "regression",
  trees = 800,
  tree_depth = 4,
  learn_rate = 0.05,
  min_n = 10
) %>%
  set_engine("xgboost")

wf <- workflow() %>% 
  add_recipe(rec) %>%
  add_model(xgb_spec)

final_fit <- wf %>% fit(data = train_mod)

holdout_preds <- predict(final_fit, test_mod) %>%
  bind_cols(test_mod %>% select(pitcher_name, year, era_next))

holdout_metrics <- holdout_preds %>% 
  metrics(truth = era_next, estimate = .pred)

readr::write_csv(holdout_metrics, file.path("outputs", "model_metrics_holdout.csv"))

```

```{r}

score_year <- 2025

score_2025 <- all_df %>%
  filter(year == score_year) %>%
  select(player_id, pitcher_name, year, any_of(setdiff(predictors, c("d_xwoba","d_whiff","d_hardhit","d_barrel","d_swing","d_era",
                                                                    "xwoba_2yr","whiff_2yr","hardhit_2yr","barrel_2yr",
                                                                    "era_xwoba_gap","velo_gap")))) %>%

  left_join(
    all_df %>%
      filter(year == score_year - 1) %>%
      transmute(
        player_id,
        xwoba_prev = xwoba,
        whiff_prev = whiff_percent,
        hardhit_prev = hard_hit_percent,
        barrel_prev = barrel_batted_rate,
        swing_prev = swing_percent,
        era_prev = p_era,
        best_prev = avg_best_speed,
        hyper_prev = avg_hyper_speed,
        decisions_prev = decisions
      ),
    by = "player_id"
  ) %>%

  mutate(
    velo_gap = 0,
    d_xwoba   = xwoba - xwoba_prev,
    d_whiff   = whiff_percent - whiff_prev,
    d_hardhit = hard_hit_percent - hardhit_prev,
    d_barrel  = barrel_batted_rate - barrel_prev,
    d_swing   = swing_percent - swing_prev,
    d_era     = p_era - era_prev,
    xwoba_2yr   = (xwoba + xwoba_prev) / 2,
    whiff_2yr   = (whiff_percent + whiff_prev) / 2,
    hardhit_2yr = (hard_hit_percent + hardhit_prev) / 2,
    barrel_2yr  = (barrel_batted_rate + barrel_prev) / 2,
    era_xwoba_gap = p_era - xwoba,
    era_next = NA_real_,
    d_decisions = decisions - decisions_prev,
    decisions_2yr = (decisions + decisions_prev) / 2
  ) %>%
  select(player_id, pitcher_name, year, era_next, any_of(predictors))

proj_2026 <- predict(final_fit, score_2025) %>%
  bind_cols(score_2025 %>% select(player_id, pitcher_name, year)) %>%
  rename(era_2026_proj = .pred) %>%
  left_join(
    all_df %>% filter(year == score_year) %>%
      select(player_id, p_era, xwoba, whiff_percent, hard_hit_percent, barrel_batted_rate),
    by = "player_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_era = era_2026_proj - p_era
  ) %>%
  arrange(era_2026_proj)

readr::write_csv(proj_2026, file.path("outputs", "era_2026_projections.csv"))

```

```{r}

comeback <- proj_2026 %>% arrange(delta_era) %>% slice_head(n = 25)
regress <- proj_2026 %>% arrange(desc(delta_era)) %>% slice_head(n = 25)

comeback_gt <- comeback %>%
  select(pitcher_name, p_era, era_2026_proj, delta_era, xwoba, whiff_percent, hard_hit_percent, barrel_batted_rate) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Pitchers to Improve in 2026",
    subtitle = "Negative ΔERA = projected improvement (2026 proj − 2025 ERA)"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    pitcher_name = "Pitcher",
    p_era = "2025 ERA",
    era_2026_proj = "Projected 2026 ERA",
    delta_era = "ΔERA",
    xwoba = "xwOBA",
    whiff_percent = "Whiff%",
    hard_hit_percent = "HardHit%",
    barrel_batted_rate = "Barrel%",
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(p_era, era_2026_proj, delta_era, xwoba), decimals = 2) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(whiff_percent, hard_hit_percent, barrel_batted_rate), decimals = 1)

regression_gt <- regress %>%
  select(pitcher_name, p_era, era_2026_proj, delta_era, xwoba, whiff_percent, hard_hit_percent, barrel_batted_rate) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Players at Risk of Regression in 2026",
    subtitle = "Positive ΔERA = projected decline (2026 proj − 2025 ERA)"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    pitcher_name = "Pitcher",
    p_era = "2025 ERA",
    era_2026_proj = "Projected 2026 ERA",
    delta_era = "ΔERA",
    xwoba = "xwOBA",
    whiff_percent = "Whiff%",
    hard_hit_percent = "HardHit%",
    barrel_batted_rate = "Barrel%",
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(p_era, era_2026_proj, delta_era, xwoba), decimals = 2) %>%
  fmt_number(columns = c(whiff_percent, hard_hit_percent, barrel_batted_rate), decimals = 1)

comeback_gt
regression_gt

gtsave(comeback_gt, file.path("outputs", "improve_2026.html"))
gtsave(regression_gt, file.path("outputs", "regression_2026.html"))

```

```{r}

p_holdout <- ggplot(holdout_preds, aes(x = era_next, y = .pred)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.35) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0) +
  labs(
    title = "Holdout: Predicted vs Actual Next-Year ERA",
    subtitle = paste0("Holdout years: ", paste(holdout_years, collapse = ", ")),
    x = "Actual ERA (Year N+1)",
    y = "Predicted ERA (Year N+1)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

ggsave(file.path("outputs", "holdout_pred_vs_actual.png"), p_holdout, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)

```
